title: revalidate real macOS TCC microphone flow after 003A

summary.overallVerdict: 003A partially real verified, not fully verified
summary.reason: The current real app-bundle launch reached notDetermined without prompting at launch, but the first real hotkey attempt blocked on missing Accessibility permission before the microphone request path.

launchState.blockedReason: Accessibility access is required before PushWrite can insert text with synthetic Cmd+V.

hotkeyAttempt.blockedReason: Accessibility access is required before PushWrite can insert text with synthetic Cmd+V.

harnessFindings: Direct executable launch and existing control-script launch are not reliable for real microphone-TCC attribution on this workstation.
The script-driven direct launch reported microphonePermissionStatus=granted even when no microphone TCC row existed for ch.baumanncreative.pushwrite.
The LaunchServices app-bundle launch was the only path that reproduced a plausible bundle-specific notDetermined state.

observations: The real app-bundle launch remained notDetermined after microphone reset.
The first real hotkey attempt blocked on Accessibility before microphone permission was requested.
mic_not_determined_allow_real.conclusion: The allow path could not be reached because the current app bundle lacks real Accessibility permission on this workstation.

observations: The real deny path was blocked by the same prior Accessibility failure.
No real microphone system prompt was reached.
mic_not_determined_deny_real.conclusion: The deny path is not assessable until the current app bundle can pass the real Accessibility gate.

observations: A real bundle-specific denied state could not be established because the true first-prompt path was not reachable.
mic_previously_denied_real.conclusion: Only validator-side evidence exists; no real bundle-specific denied state was confirmed in 003B.

mic_allowed_real.categoryLabel: Produktpfad plausibel, aber real nicht voll bestaetigt
observations: The current real app-bundle path was reset to notDetermined and blocked on Accessibility before microphone request.
A direct executable launch can show granted but is not reliable for product-specific microphone TCC attribution.
mic_allowed_real.conclusion: The authorized real-bundle path remains open.

mic_allowed_but_no_device_or_recorder_fa.categoryLabel: Produktpfad plausibel, aber real nicht voll bestaetigt
observations: The real allowed prerequisite was not reached for the current app bundle.
mic_allowed_but_no_device_or_recorder_fa.conclusion: Real recorder/device-failure separation remains unconfirmed in 003B.

observations: The real bundle launch showed microphonePermissionStatus=notDetermined with no launch prompt.
The first real hotkey attempt produced triggered -> blocked.
No recording, transcription, or insert artifacts were created.
no_regression_accessibility_insert_path_.conclusion: Accessibility blocking remained separate from microphone TCC in the real app-bundle run.

notes: A fresh 003B attempt to rerun the old recording validator was not used as pass/fail evidence because its direct-launch baseline no longer matched the real app-bundle TCC conditions.
A fresh insert-validator rerun showed harness drift and was likewise not used to overturn the real 003B classification.

recommendation.nextStep: Grant Accessibility to the exact current PushWrite.app bundle or use a stable signed bundle path, then rerun the real LaunchServices-based microphone prompt tests.
requiredForFullVerification: real mic_not_determined_allow prompt observed at recording intent
real mic_not_determined_deny prompt observed at recording intent
